And for their anniversary, Spotify decided it was worth it—if just for ooone more useless feature— to crash consistently for over a week. I have seen this app incorporate many silly, some useful and many useless features, and always at a dual cost: a price that predictably increases with a UX that predictably crashes more and more. I was rooting for you (no, literally, I invested in you), and at this point it is I who has been made a fool. I will be joining the exit strategy brought on by social movements, yes, and also bc of poor UX. It is embarrassing for me, yeah, but definitely for you. 
Kind regards, Spotify user since 2013.
